modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Confusion about using the USD Book Advance payment option

full_description_text:  
I was trying to pay for my books at the start of the semester, but I got really confused. I don’t understand what this Book Advance thing is and why I’m being charged $500. Also, I heard something about a book loan option, but I’m not sure if it’s still available. Can someone please help me figure this out?
